name: agent-harness
description: Reusable Codex harness for fixed-path task control and adapter-driven workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Resolve project task, goal, run, adapter, and worktree workflows.
interface.longDescription: Agent Harness provides reusable Codex workflow protocols for fixed-contract and adapter-contract projects: task routing, project adapters, configurable artifact paths, goal handoffs, run packets, gates, and worktree policy guidance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Agent Harness to inspect this project, resolve its harness contract and adapter paths, then recommend the next goal.
